hero.title: Hey, I'm Fabricio
hero.description: Full Stack Software Engineer with experience delivering production-ready software across SaaS, real estate, hospitality, and enterprise platforms. Specialized in React, Next.js, Laravel, and TypeScript, with ownership of end-to-end products, cloud infrastructure, and DevOps. At Reborn Developments (Rekaliber, Reborn Rentals, GRBG, Reborn Host). Former Team Lead at GoIT. From Cochabamba, Bolivia 🇧🇴.

note.description: I DELIVER PRODUCTION-READY SOFTWARE: STRONG FRONTEND, SOLID BACKEND, INFRASTRUCTURE, AND OPERATIONAL CONTINUITY. FOCUSED ON SCALABILITY, RELIABILITY, AND REAL BUSINESS IMPACT.

reborn.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
reborn.description: Full-stack development for the international investment platform and Reborn Host. Laravel/PHP backend and Next.js/React/TypeScript frontend; Host with Next.js and PHP (SMTP) for email. Owned deployments on Hostinger VPS with Cloudflare (DNS, SSL), CI/CD, and production operations. Built REST APIs, authentication, and third-party integrations.

rebornrental.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
rebornrental.description: Frontend and backend development for the construction equipment rental platform. Creative UX/UI and product-flow overhaul on Blade + Laravel/PHP, maintaining and evolving the production site.

rekaliber.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
rekaliber.description: All-in-one enterprise SaaS in private beta: credential vault (2FA/TOTP), session proxy, workflows, task manager, team chat, and multi-LLM AI Hub. Laravel backend: REST APIs, secret encryption, OAuth, multi-tenant logic, and AI integrations (OpenAI, Gemini, Azure AI).

profunded.title: Frontend Developer
profunded.description: Frontend-exclusive work: reusable Next.js/React/TypeScript components and migration from Blade views to Next.js to unify the UI, improve maintainability, and speed up iteration.

goit.title: Full Stack Developer Intern – Team Lead
goit.description: Led a full-stack educational platform: web (Next.js, NestJS) and mobile (React Native, Expo) backed by PostgreSQL. Integrated Moodle for course management, enrollment, and progress tracking. Mentored developers, ran code reviews, and delivered on time.

spm.title: Software Project Manager Intern
spm.description: Managed five software development teams: planning, requirements, timelines, and deliverables. Trained developers in React, React Native, and Git. Supervised repositories and code integration, delivering deployment-ready academic projects.

founder.title: Founder & Project Manager
founder.description: Founded FluenceSoft to deliver custom software for real business needs. Mentored developers in React and React Native with technical training and guidance.

freelance.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
freelance.description: End-to-end production projects. Hydraulic Sistem: Astro + Supabase e-commerce, WhatsApp sales, SEO, deployed on Netlify (hydraulics-sistem.com).

ui.stackIntegrityDescription: All projects undergo rigorous technical vetting and maintain a 98% uptime baseline during development cycles.

grb.title: GRB Group - Corporate Website
grb.description: Part of the Reborn Developments ecosystem. Corporate website for GRB Group (global real estate), built with Astro: professional design, clear navigation, dynamic sections, and SEO for real estate investment and technology services.

profunded.title: ProFunded - Prop Trading Platform
profunded.description: Frontend development at ProFunded: reusable Next.js components and migration from Blade views to Next.js to unify the UI system, speed up iteration, and improve performance.

rekaliber.title: Rekaliber - All-in-One Enterprise SaaS
rekaliber.description: Product within the Reborn ecosystem. Enterprise SaaS: credential vault with 2FA/TOTP, session proxy, workflows, task manager, team chat, and multi-LLM AI Hub. Laravel backend: REST APIs, secret encryption, OAuth, AI module (OpenAI, Gemini, Azure AI), and multi-tenant logic. Private beta.

rebornrental.title: Reborn Rental - Construction Equipment Rental
rebornrental.description: Part of the Reborn ecosystem. Construction equipment rental platform in Denver, Colorado. Full-stack on Blade + Laravel PHP with a creative UX/UI overhaul, maintenance, and ongoing product evolution.

reborn.title: Reborn Developments - Investment Platform
reborn.description: Core Reborn ecosystem platform for international investments. PHP Laravel backend and Next.js frontend; deployed on Hostinger with Cloudflare. Real estate project management, risk analysis, and production integrations.

rebornhost.title: Reborn Host - Property Management
rebornhost.description: Part of the Reborn ecosystem. Hospitality / short-term rental site (Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com). Next.js frontend with PHP for email delivery (SMTP). Deployed on Hostinger with Cloudflare.

hydraulics.title: Hydraulic Sistem - E-commerce Repuestos Hidráulicos
hydraulics.description: End-to-end production project: hydraulic parts e-commerce with Astro, Supabase, WhatsApp sales, SEO, and Netlify deploy with custom domain.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full Stack Software Engineer with a B.Sc. in Computer Systems Engineering from Universidad del Valle (2020–2024), Cochabamba, Bolivia. I've been programming since I was 12 and specialize in delivering production-ready software.
about.paragraph2: I have experience building platforms across SaaS, real estate, hospitality, and enterprise. A key achievement was delivering five deployment-ready projects at UMA, with recognition as Software Project Manager Intern and a recommendation letter from my department director.
about.paragraph3: I work separately across Reborn Developments, Reborn Rentals, Rekaliber, and Reborn Host: full-stack with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Laravel, and MySQL; infrastructure with Hostinger VPS, Dokploy, and Cloudflare; and integrations with Odoo, OpenAI, Gemini, and Azure AI. Previously Team Lead at GoIT (Next.js, NestJS, React Native, Moodle, PostgreSQL).
about.paragraph4: My goal is to keep owning technical initiatives end-to-end—from architecture and backend to deployment—ensuring reliability, scalability, and continuity of production systems.
